routing_hints.non_use_boundary: Do not use this fixture for negative, stale, release, or package publication claims.
routing_hints.conflict_rule: Use only direct local evidence in this suite directory.

evidence_expectations: Member status checked requires a direct evidence_source or evidence_location file.
Closure data must use current suite report and evidence files rather than runtime ids or progress-ledger-only proof.
maintenance_ownership: Fixture maintainers refresh suite records when checker schema or member-root rules change.
residual_risk: The suite map covers one positive member and does not exercise multi-member edge cases.
claim_boundary: This suite map covers only the good_suite positive fixture records and member reference. It does not prove runtime checker execution, fixture coverage, CLI checks, tests, suite automation, package publication, code-contract validation, release readiness, or future AI behavior without separate current evidence.
